title: CMD Kerala Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Project Officer Posts
description: The Centre for Management Development Kerala (CMD Kerala) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Officer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.Sc. and Post-graduation can apply for the CMD Kerala Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection pr...
